# uptimekuma_notification_smsmanager (Resource)

SMS Manager notification resource

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "uptimekuma_notification_smsmanager" "example" {
  name         = "SMS Manager Notification"
  is_active    = true
  api_key      = "your_smsmanager_api_key"
  numbers      = "+1234567890"
  message_type = "sms"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `api_key` (String, Sensitive) SMS Manager API key for authentication
- `name` (String) Notification name
- `numbers` (String) Recipient phone number

### Optional

- `apply_existing` (Boolean)
- `is_active` (Boolean)
- `is_default` (Boolean)
- `message_type` (String) Message gateway type

### Read-Only

- `id` (Number) Notification identifier
